fern.label: Fern
fern.tip: Indirect light; keep soil lightly moist.
fern.watering: Water when the top inch of soil feels dry. Mist leaves 2 to 3 times per week.
fern.light: Bright indirect light. Avoid hot afternoon sun on the leaves.
fern.funFact: Ferns love steady moisture and have been around since before dinosaurs.

succulent.label: Succulent
succulent.tip: Bright light; let soil dry between waterings.
succulent.watering: Water deeply, then wait until soil is fully dry. Usually every 1 to 2 weeks.
succulent.light: Bright light, including some direct sun.
mistakes: Keeping in a dark, damp corner
succulent.funFact: Succulents store water in their leaves, so they are built for dry spells.

moss.label: Moss
moss.watering: Keep evenly moist. Mist daily if the air is dry.
moss.light: Low to medium indirect light. Too much sun can dry moss quickly.
moss.funFact: Moss has no roots; it drinks through its leaves.
